name: OPTION_A_XAUUSD_5M_SHADOW_60D

validated_metrics.note: Below 80% WR target but economically viable. Best honest result from all XAUUSD research.

why_not_80pct: Tight TP needed for 80% WR produces PF<0.50 (negative EV). WR/payoff tradeoff is structurally irresolvable on 5m XAUUSD with VWAP MR.
